info.description: AI-Powered Load Testing Tool Backend API.
info.title: Gatling-Backend API

post.description: Generates a new API Key for the user (shown only once).
Logs in a user with email and password, returns a JWT token pair.
Generates a new access token using a refresh token.
Creates a new user and returns a JWT token pair.

get.description: Lists all projects owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Adds a new member to a project.

get.description: Gets the usage statistics (runs, VUs) for a project.
Compares two test runs (baseline vs current).
Gets a specific test report by ID.
Gets an AI generated summary for a specific test report.

post.description: Exports a report in the specified format (e.g. PDF, CSV).

get.description: Lists all test runs for a given project.

post.description: Starts a new load test execution.

get.description: Gets detailed information for a specific test run by ID.
Gets the time-series metrics for a test run.

post.description: Stops a currently running test run.

get.description: Lists all test scenarios for a given project.

post.description: Generates a test scenario using AI based on a prompt.

get.description: Gets detailed information for a specific scenario by ID.

put.description: Updates the data of an existing scenario by ID.

delete.description: Deletes a scenario from the system by ID.

post.description: Clones an existing scenario with a new name.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
